ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Pineapple, in pineapple juice, canned, drained
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: VEGETABLES (75%) (Broccoli, Carrot, Cabbage, Bok Choy, Snow or Snap Pea, Kale), GINGER GARLIC SAUCE (25%) (Water, Sugar, Soy Sauce (Wheat), Pineapple Juice, Rice and White Wine Vinegars, Thickener (1442,415,412), Salt, Sesame Seeds, Ginger, Garlic, Herbs and Spices, Preservative (202)).
